Uses of Class
user.RegisteredClient

Packages that use RegisteredClient
Package
Description
exchange
It includes everything exchange-unique.
order
It includes everything order-unique.
product
It includes everything product-unique.
store
It contains everything related to the management of the store.

    The offer's complete constructor (without id)
